task_completion.description: Open the dive log application with the dive data loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application (or similar dive log software) is open on the screen, displaying a list of dives.

task_completion.description: Identify dives with a maximum depth strictly greater than 20 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive list is sorted by depth, or a filter is applied, clearly showing dives with a depth value greater than 20.0m.
One or more dives with a depth > 20m are highlighted/selected in the dive list panel.

task_completion.description: Add the tag 'DeepTech' to the selected dives.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'DeepTech' is typed or visible in the Tags field (usually in the Information or Notes panel) for the selected dive(s).

task_completion.description: Save the updated dive log to /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/' (or just Documents) and the filename 'dives.ssrf', or a notification confirms the file was saved to this path.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to add tags rather than editing the raw file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Subsurface application interface (e.g., clicking the Tags field), not a text editor or terminal modifying the .ssrf XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent only tagged dives strictly greater than 20 meters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The selection in the dive list should only include dives with a depth > 20m when the 'DeepTech' tag is being applied. Dives <= 20m should not be selected.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact tag 'DeepTech'.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'DeepTech' (case-sensitive, no extra spaces) is visible in the tags input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The depth threshold is strictly greater than 20.0 meters. The exact expected tag is 'DeepTech'. The target save path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf'.
